name: idea-check
description: Continuously verify that plain-language product ideas remain true.

interface.shortDescription: Verify that product ideas remain true.
interface.longDescription: Idea Check lets coding agents implement human-owned product ideas completely and verify them with fresh evidence in any harness.
defaultPrompt: Verify the ideas in this project.
Implement this idea until it is fully supported.
Try to falsify our most important product ideas.
